title: AGRICULTURAL KNOWLEDGE: LINKING FARMERS, ADVISORS AND RESEARCHERS TO BOOST INNOVATION
subtitle: LINSA: Alternative pathways to sustainable agriculture
description: A practice abstract presenting Learning and Innovation Networks for Sustainable Agriculture (LINSA), which are multi-stakeholder networks co-creating and disseminating innovations for sustainable agricultural development. It outlines the roles of advisors and facilitators in establishing governance, building trust, and providing both technical and social skills to support LINSA processes effectively.
